info.title: The Longevity Agent API
info.description: Supplement price comparison engine. Compare prices across trusted vendors, check interactions, and build supplement stacks.

get.description: Search products by name, ingredient, or vendor. Returns prices, per-serving costs, and vendor trust scores.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search by product name, ingredient, or brand

parameters.name: ingredient
parameters.description: Filter by ingredient slug (e.g., quercetin, omega-3, nmn)

parameters.name: vendor
parameters.description: Filter by vendor slug (e.g., nootropics-depot, iherb)

200.description: List of products with prices and vendor info

get.summary: Get a single product with alternatives

get.description: Returns all 60+ supplement ingredients with metadata including typical doses, mechanisms, and product counts.

get.summary: Get ingredient details with all products and research
get.description: Returns full ingredient info including all products sorted by per-serving price, research citations, interactions, and synergies.

200.description: Ingredient details with products, research, and interactions

get.summary: List all vendors with trust scores
get.description: Returns all vetted supplement vendors with trust scores (1-10 scale), trust notes, and whether they ship direct.

200.description: List of vendors with trust scores

get.summary: Compare multiple products and get total pricing
get.description: Compare products by slug, get individual and total pricing, and a cart URL for easy checkout.

parameters.name: vendor
parameters.description: Lock comparison to a specific vendor slug

200.description: Comparison results with totals and cart URL

get.description: Check for drug/supplement interactions between ingredients. Important for safety — flags contraindications like Vitamin K2 with warfarin.

parameters.name: ingredients
parameters.description: Comma-separated ingredient slugs to check (e.g., quercetin,vitamin-k2,omega-3)

get.description: Returns supplement stacks from researchers like Bryan Johnson, Andrew Huberman, Peter Attia, Rhonda Patrick, and Ben Greenfield.

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: Get a specific protocol by slug (e.g., bryan-johnson-blueprint)

200.description: Protocol stacks with ingredients and dosing notes
